title: Rank-based two-column stacker
summary: Train a simple stacker on percentile ranks of RealMLP core and CatBoost predictions.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Convert OOF and test prediction columns to percentile ranks for p_realmlp_core and p_catboost. Train a strongly regularized logistic stacker on the two rank columns. Keep output valid probabilities.
expected_effect: Optimize AUC-oriented ordering while reducing calibration dependence.
risk: Rank transforms may discard useful probability magnitude information.
